questions.question: On the road to which city did Saul encounter a blinding light and hear the voice of Jesus?
Who was sent by God to lay hands on Saul so he could regain his sight?
Saul was blind for seven days after his encounter on the road.
Jesus said to Saul, 'Saul, Saul, why do you _____ me?'
In Joppa, Peter raised a disciple named _____ from the dead.
